hero_match.title: Sheffield Shield Final: Victoria vs South Australia
hero_match.user_agent: Mozilla/5.0 (Linux; Android 10; K) AppleWebKit/537.36 (KHTML, like Gecko) Chrome/120.0.0.0 Mobile Safari/537.36

summary: The New Zealand vs South Africa 5th T20I has concluded with South Africa winning the series 3-2. The Sheffield Shield Final between Victoria and South Australia was scheduled for today and is the most likely candidate for a live stream, though it may have just finished.
